phases.name: 截面标准化 + 中性化管线
phases.rationale: 当前因子暴露严重偏向size（小市值）。中性化可消除size bias，预计提升夏普0.15-0.30。

tasks.name: 创建中性化算子模块: factors/neutralization.py

interface.signature: def neutralize_ols_residual(factor: pd.Series, controls: pd.DataFrame, min_obs: int = 10) -> pd.Series

parameters.controls: 控制变量 DataFrame (MultiIndex: [date, symbol]), columns=[size_log, ind_电子, ind_银行, ...]
parameters.min_obs: 截面最小观测数，低于此值不回归直接返回原值

interface.returns: 残差 Series (MultiIndex对齐), 中性化后的纯净因子
interface.algorithm: 逐date groupby -> np.linalg.lstsq(X, y, rcond=None) -> residuals = y - X @ beta

test_logic: test_neutralize_ols_basic: 构造已知线性关系 y = 2*x + noise, 对x回归后残差与x相关系数|corr|<0.05
test_neutralize_ols_min_obs: 当某日obs<min_obs时，返回原值不变
test_neutralize_ols_multiindex: 输入为MultiIndex [date,symbol]，输出index完全对齐
test_neutralize_ols_industry: 构造3行业dummy，回归后各行业均值≈0（±0.01容差）
test_neutralize_ols_preserve_rank: 中性化前后Spearman rank corr > 0.7（确保不破坏排序信息）
tasks.expected_effect: 消除size暴露后，原高size_corr因子(如pb)的IC提升15-30%

tasks.name: 创建Winsorize + ZScore管线: factors/preprocessing.py

interface.signature: def winsorize_cross_sectional(series: pd.Series, method: str = 'mad', n_mad: float = 5.0, level: str = 'date') -> pd.Series

interface_2.signature: def zscore_cross_sectional(series: pd.Series, level: str = 'date') -> pd.Series
interface_2.returns: z-score标准化后的Series，每截面mean=0, std=1

interface_3.signature: def preprocess_pipeline(factor: pd.Series, controls: pd.DataFrame = None, config: dict = None) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_winsorize_mad: 构造含outlier(100)的数据，缩尾后max值 ≤ median + 5*MAD
test_winsorize_preserves_order: 缩尾前后rank correlation = 1.0（排序不变）
test_zscore_cross_sectional: 每date分组后，mean≈0, std≈1（容差±0.01）
test_preprocess_pipeline_full: 输入raw factor -> 输出中性化zscore，验证每步属性
tasks.expected_effect: 消除极端值扭曲，标准化后不同量纲因子可比

tasks.name: 集成行业分类数据加载: data/industry.py

interface.signature: def load_industry_map(data_dir: str = None, method: str = 'sw') -> pd.DataFrame
interface.data_source: 本地CSV/Parquet缓存，或akshare tushare实时获取

interface_2.signature: def build_dummy_matrix(industry_map: pd.DataFrame, symbols: list, drop_first: bool = True) -> pd.DataFrame
interface_2.returns: dummy DataFrame (index=symbol, columns=ind_xxx), 用于OLS回归X矩阵

test_logic: test_load_industry_map: 返回DataFrame，无NaN，所有symbol都有industry
test_build_dummy_matrix: 输入10 symbols 3 industries -> 输出(10, 2) matrix (drop_first=True)
test_dummy_matrix_orthogonal: dummy columns之间线性无关（rank = n_cols）
tasks.expected_effect: 行业中性化需要准确的行业分类，消除行业bias

tasks.name: 修改现有策略: 应用中性化后的因子

interface.example: S1_ST_turnaround: lambda fp, date: preprocess_pipeline(fp.loc[date, 'mcap'], controls, config)

test_logic: test_strategy_s1_neutralized: 应用中性化后S1的size_corr < 0.1（原值约0.6）
test_strategy_s1_ic_improvement: 中性化后IC均值提升 > 0.01
test_backtest_with_neutralization: 完整回测，验证sharpe比原引擎高

tasks.name: 运行UC1验证脚本: uc1_validate_neutralization.py

interface.returns: DataFrame(columns=[strategy, original_sharpe, neutralized_sharpe, delta_sharpe, original_drawdown, neutralized_drawdown])

test_logic: test_uc1_validation_runs: 脚本运行不报错，输出完整DataFrame
test_uc1_sharpe_improvement: 至少3个策略的中性化后sharpe > 原sharpe
test_uc1_size_corr_drop: 所有策略的size_corr < 0.2
tasks.expected_effect: 生成UC1验证报告，量化中性化收益

phases.name: 新Alpha因子挖掘
phases.rationale: 现有因子枯竭，需要新alpha来源。UC1完成后在新因子上直接应用中性化。

tasks.name: 实现A1: 短期反转(成交量加权)

interface.signature: def short_term_reversal(self, window: int = 20, volume_weighted: bool = True) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_a1_ic_negative: A1的IC均值 < 0（反转效应）
test_a1_size_corr_low: 中性化后|size_corr| < 0.15
test_a1_turnover_reasonable: 月度换手率 < 40%
tasks.expected_effect: 提供负IC alpha，与动量因子负相关，分散风险

tasks.name: 实现A2: 彩票偏好规避
test_logic: test_a2_ic_negative: 彩票规避应有负IC
test_a2_corr_with_a1: |corr(A1, A2)| < 0.5（确保独立alpha）
tasks.expected_effect: 规避散户过度追捧的彩票股，降低组合风险

tasks.name: 实现A3: 股东集中度
test_logic: test_a3_fallback_works: 无shareholders列时fallback逻辑正确
test_a3_positive_ic: 筹码集中应有正IC

tasks.name: 实现A4: 收益加速(PEAD)
test_logic: test_a4_ic_positive: 收益加速应有正IC
test_a4_corr_with_momentum: |corr(A4, mom20d)| < 0.6（与纯动量不同）
tasks.expected_effect: 捕捉信息扩散初期的加速alpha

tasks.name: 实现A5: 质量价值
test_logic: test_a5_fallback: 无财务数据时fallback到-pb
test_a5_ic_positive: 质量价值应有正IC（避开价值陷阱）
tasks.expected_effect: 在便宜股中筛选质量好的，避免价值陷阱

phases.name: 因子动物园评估 + 动态组合
phases.rationale: UC2产生新因子后，需要IC/IR筛选+去相关+动态组合权重。

tasks.name: 重构FactorZooEvaluator: IC/IR + 衰减 + 模拟组合

methods.compute_ic: def compute_ic(self, factor: pd.Series, returns: pd.Series, method: str = 'spearman') -> Tuple[float, float, float, float]
methods.compute_ic_decay: def compute_ic_decay(self, factor: pd.Series, returns: pd.Series, max_lag: int = 12) -> pd.Series
methods.simulate_portfolio: def simulate_portfolio(self, factor: pd.Series, returns: pd.Series, top_pct: float = 0.1) -> pd.Series
methods.evaluate: def evaluate(self, factor: pd.Series, name: str) -> FactorStats

test_logic: test_ic_spearman: 已知rank关系的factor/return，IC ≈ 1.0
test_ic_ir_positive: 有效因子IC-IR > 0.3
test_ic_decay: IC衰减曲线单调递减
test_simulate_portfolio: top 10%组合收益 > 随机组合收益（t-test p<0.05）
tasks.expected_effect: 精确筛选有效因子，淘汰IC-IR<0.3的噪声

tasks.name: 实现IC-IR动态组合权重

interface.signature: def combine_factors_ic_weighted(factors: Dict[str, pd.Series], ic_stats: Dict[str, FactorStats], min_ic_ir: float = 0.3) -> pd.Series
interface.algorithm: 1. filter(ic_ir > min_ic_ir) -> 2. weight = max(|ic_ir|, 0.01) -> 3. normalize -> 4. weighted_sum
interface.flip_negative: ic_mean < 0 的因子取反后再加权

test_logic: test_ic_weighted_sum: 两个IC=0.05的因子组合后IC > 单个因子IC
test_flip_negative: ic_mean<0的因子翻转后IC>0
test_min_ic_ir_filter: ic_ir<0.3的因子权重=0
tasks.expected_effect: 组合后IC稳定性提升，IC-IR提高20-40%

tasks.name: 实现去相关贪心筛选

interface.signature: def decorrelate_selection(factors: Dict[str, pd.Series], candidates: List[str], max_corr: float = 0.6) -> List[str]
interface.algorithm: 贪心: 选IC-IR最高的 -> 逐个加入，要求与已选因子|corr|<max_corr

test_logic: test_decorrelate_basic: 3个因子corr=[0.9,0.9,0.3]，选2个（第一个和第三个）
test_decorrelate_empty: candidates为空返回[]
test_decorrelate_all_high_corr: 全部高度相关，只返回1个
tasks.expected_effect: 避免多重共线性，组合更稳健

phases.name: 引擎逐日循环精化
phases.rationale: P0EngineV2存在逐日循环高估/低估问题。需要更 realistic 的 rebalancing 和 cost model。

tasks.name: 重构P0EngineV2.run()为逐日事件循环

interface.new_signature: def run(self, ranking_factor: str, ascending: bool = True, rebalance_freq: int = 20) -> BacktestResult
daily_loop: 2.   universe = apply_pit_universe(day)  # 剔除当日不可交易股票
5.     scores = apply_neutralization(scores, controls, day)  # UC1集成

test_logic: test_daily_loop_no_lookahead: 验证day t的决策只用day t及之前的数据
test_rebalance_freq_20: 20日调仓，验证换手率与调仓频率一致
test_transaction_costs_applied: 每次调仓后equity减少cost amount
tasks.expected_effect: 消除vectorized backtest的look-ahead bias，夏普更 realistic

tasks.name: 实现交易成本模型

methods.__init__: def __init__(self, commission_rate: float = 0.00025, slippage_bps: float = 10.0, impact_model: str = 'almgren')
methods.compute_costs: def compute_costs(self, turnover: float, adv: pd.Series = None) -> float

test_logic: test_cost_zero_turnover: turnover=0时cost=0
test_cost_linear_commission: 验证commission与turnover线性关系
test_cost_almgren_shape: order_size/ADV越大，impact成本越高（凸函数）
tasks.expected_effect: 每次调仓成本约10-30bps，年化侵蚀收益2-5%

tasks.name: 校准S4/S11的止损参数

interface.change: strategies_v2.py 中 S4.stop_loss 和 S11.stop_loss
interface.calibration_method: grid_search over [-0.50, -0.20] with step 0.05, pick sharpe_max

test_logic: test_s4_stop_loss_grid: 在grid中找最优stop_loss，验证drawdown<-30%
test_s11_stop_loss_grid: 同上
test_stop_loss_triggered: 模拟价格跌破止损线，验证组合减仓

phases.name: 集成测试 + 部署验证

tasks.name: 端到端P1流水线测试

interface.signature: def run_p1_full_pipeline(data_dir: str) -> Tuple[Dict[str, pd.Series], pd.DataFrame, BacktestResult]

test_logic: test_p1_full_pipeline_runs: 完整流水线运行不报错，<10分钟
test_p1_deployable_count: 至少1个策略达到deployable（sharpe>=1.0, drawdown<-30%）
test_p1_ic_improvement: 中性化后平均IC比原引擎高 > 0.01
tasks.expected_effect: 完整P1流水线验证，至少1个策略deployable

tasks.name: 生成P1诊断报告
test_logic: test_report_generated: CSV文件存在，所有列完整
test_report_at_least_one_deployable: deployable=True的行数>=1
tasks.expected_effect: 量化P1改进效果，确定deployable策略

risk_mitigation.data_availability: 行业分类数据可能缺失。Fallback: 用市值分位数proxy行业（大盘/中盘/小盘）。
risk_mitigation.neutralization_overfit: strength=0.5保留原始rank信息，避免完全去活性化。
risk_mitigation.new_alpha_noise: UC3门槛IC-IR>0.3，确保只有统计显著的因子进入组合。
risk_mitigation.cost_model_uncertainty: Almgren参数eta=0.1为保守估计，可校准。

success_criteria.minimum: 至少1个策略达到deployable（sharpe>=1.0, drawdown<-30%, deflated_sharpe>0）
